series_metadata.series_title: Southern Ohio Agricultural and Community Development Foundation
series_metadata.series_description: SOACDF was created in 1998 from money Ohio received as part of a lawsuit settlement reached with tobacco companies after the Tobacco Settlement Trust program ended. These records include but are not limited to Annual Reports, Board Meeting Minutes and Financial Records.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep until program has ended and 1 year after the final State Audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. Contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. Dispose of if not transferred. ; Electronic: Keep until program has ended and 1 year after the final State Audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. Contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. Dispose of if not transferred., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
